data.title: Eric Trump joins Metaplanet strategic board of advisors
data.description:
Bitcoin-stacking firm Metaplanet has appointed US President Donald Trump’s son, Eric Trump, to its newly established Strategic Board of Advisors to further Metaplanet’s mission to become a “global leader in the Bitcoin economy.””His business acumen, love of the Bitcoin community and global hospitality perspective will be invaluable in accelerating Metaplanet’s vision of becoming one of the world’s leading Bitcoin Treasury Companies,” Metaplanet’s CEO Simon Gerovich said in a March 21 announcement on X.”As a globally recognized business leader and entrepreneur, Eric Trump brings a wealth of experience in real estate, finance, brand development, and strategic business growth and has become a leading voice and advocate of digital asset adoption worldwide,” Metaplanet added.

*Metaplanet Appoints Eric Trump to Strategic Board of Advisors* pic
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/eric-trump-joins-metaplanet-strategic-board-advisors?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: VanEck Ventures backs Manifest’s tokenized real estate ETF
data.description:
VanEck Ventures invested in Manifest, a platform bringing U.S. real estate into DeFi.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/vaneck-ventures-invested-in-manifest/

data.title: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth announces fresh $850M DOGE cuts at the DOD
data.description:
The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) is active in the Department of Defense (DOD), according to a disclosure by Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth. The Trump appointee shared a video where he listed the agency’s discoveries and those that have been discontinued.  In the footage Hegseth posted on his official X page, he announced his decision […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/defense-secretary-hegseth-850m-doge-cuts/

data.title: US spot Ethereum ETF had a net outflow of $12.4 million yesterday
data.description: Trader T monitoring shows that the US spot Ethereum ETF had a net outflow of US$12.4 million yesterday, marking the 12th consecutive day of net outflow.

data.title: Ethereum ETF Experiences Continued Outflows
data.description: According to Odaily, recent monitoring by Trader T indicates that U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs saw a net outflow of $12.4 million yesterday, marking the twelfth consecutive day of net outflows.

data.title: Missouri Bitcoin Reserve Bill HB1217 Referred to the House Intergovernmental Affairs Committee
data.description: Bitcoin Laws revealed that the Missouri Bitcoin Reserve Act HB1217 has been referred to the House Select Committee on Intergovernmental Affairs.

data.title: Japanese listed company Metaplanet appoints Trump's second son Eric Trump as a member of its strategic advisory board
data.description: Japanese listed company Metaplanet announced the establishment of its strategic advisory board and appointed Trump's second son Eric Trump as a member of the strategic advisory board.

data.title: Tokenized real estate investment platform Manifest Finance completes $2.5 million financing, led by VanEck
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Manifest Finance, a tokenized real estate investment platform, has completed a $2.5 million financing, led by VanEck, with participation from Lattice Fund, Compound and SALT fund. According to reports, Manifest is a decentralized finance (DeFi) platform that allows users to invest in tokenized U.S. real estate assets. By leveraging blockchain technology, Manifest provides partial ownership opportunities, enabling investors to acquire real-world assets (RWA) with lower capital requirements and higher liquidity.
